category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-El Salvador EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入萨尔瓦多：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入薩爾瓦多：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against El Salvador OSARTEC / OSN standards context, SIGET electricity regulation and distributor coordination, 120/240 V 60 Hz input expectations, Americas-market J1772 / CCS1 connector assumptions that must be confirmed project by project, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 61851-23 DC charging, IEC 61000 EMC, OCPP network readiness, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与萨尔瓦多OSARTEC / OSN标准背景、SIGET电力监管及配电公司协调、120/240 V 60 Hz输入预期、须逐项目确认的美洲市场J1772 / CCS1接口假设、IEC 61851安全、IEC 61851-23直流充电、IEC 61000电磁兼容、OCPP联网准备，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與薩爾瓦多OSARTEC / OSN標準背景、SIGET電力監管及配電公司協調、120/240 V 60 Hz輸入預期、須逐項目確認的美洲市場J1772 / CCS1接口假設、IEC 61851安全、IEC 61851-23直流充電、IEC 61000電磁相容、OCPP聯網準備，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering El Salvador, the practical gaps are 120/240 V, 60 Hz input validation; SIGET and distributor coordination for grid-connected installations; OSARTEC / OSN conformity review where a Salvadoran technical regulation or adopted standard applies; and connector hardware conversion away from China GB/T 20234. El Salvador is an Americas-style 60 Hz market, so SAE J1772 Type 1 AC and CCS1 DC are the likely practical connector ecosystem, but exporters should confirm the required connector with SIGET, the distributor, site owner, tender, or charge-point operator before quoting. GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with J1772 / CCS1 inlets, and GB/T 27930 DC communication is not a substitute for CCS communication or OCPP network requirements.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入萨尔瓦多时，实务差距包括：120/240 V、60 Hz输入验证；并网安装需与SIGET及配电公司协调；适用萨尔瓦多技术法规或采标标准时需进行OSARTEC / OSN合格评定审查；接口硬件须从中国GB/T 20234改为当地项目要求的接口。萨尔瓦多属于美洲式60 Hz市场，因此SAE J1772 Type 1交流和CCS1直流是较可能的实务接口体系，但出口商应在报价前向SIGET、配电公司、场地方、招标文件或充电点运营商确认接口要求。GB/T接口与J1772 / CCS1车辆接口在物理上不兼容，GB/T 27930直流通信也不能替代CCS通信或OCPP联网要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入薩爾瓦多時，實務差距包括：120/240 V、60 Hz輸入驗證；併網安裝需與SIGET及配電公司協調；適用薩爾瓦多技術法規或採標標準時需進行OSARTEC / OSN合格評定審查；接口硬體須從中國GB/T 20234改為當地項目要求的接口。薩爾瓦多屬於美洲式60 Hz市場，因此SAE J1772 Type 1交流和CCS1直流是較可能的實務接口體系，但出口商應在報價前向SIGET、配電公司、場地方、招標文件或充電點運營商確認接口要求。GB/T接口與J1772 / CCS1車輛接口在物理上不兼容，GB/T 27930直流通訊也不能替代CCS通訊或OCPP聯網要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, OSARTEC / OSN scope determination, SIGET approval, distributor interconnection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, network operators, and installers should verify current Salvadoran technical regulations, adopted IEC standard editions, SIGET and distributor requirements, connector requirements, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、OSARTEC / OSN适用范围裁定、SIGET批准、配电公司接入批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行萨尔瓦多技术法规、采标IEC版本、SIGET及配电公司要求、接口要求和安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、OSARTEC / OSN適用範圍裁定、SIGET批准、配電公司接入批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行薩爾瓦多技術法規、採標IEC版本、SIGET及配電公司要求、接口要求和安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
